error_signature: append node ignores dynamic fields with processed JSON data
title: Google Sheets append node ignores dynamic fields
symptom: When using the Google Sheets append node with processed JSON data, dynamic fields are not available for configuration. The append node only uses metadata from the previous node instead of the intended JSON data.
applies_when: Data is processed into JSON before appending
not_this_if: Appending directly from the spreadsheet creation node's metadata
root_cause: The Google Sheets append node requires headers to be present in the input JSON to map fields correctly. If the sheet is newly created and has no headers, the append node defaults to using metadata from the previous node instead of the intended JSON data.
fix_steps: Add a Set node before the append node to define header names and values.
Map the desired JSON data to the headers in the Set node.
Connect the Set node to the append node to ensure the correct data is passed.
agent_instruction: Use a Set node to define headers before the append node to ensure dynamic fields are recognized.
